entries.excerpt: Before we get started, likewise, I was researching a little introduction for our guest, Gene Schwartz. I was going through some industry publications and books, and I came across a couple of quotes that I just wanted to read. I picked out three of the many that I came across....

entries.title: 002 breakthrough advertising cd1

entries.title: 003 breakthrough advertising cd2

entries.title: 004 breakthrough advertising cd3
entries.excerpt: Welcome to our third call in the Gene Schwartz graduate course in marketing. And today we have with us Denny Hatch who's a freelance direct marketing consultant, writer, and designer. In 1984 with his wife Peggy he founded the newsletter Who's Mailing What, which is now called...
